alexey_fyodorovitch_karamazov.name: Alexey Fyodorovitch Karamazov
alexey_fyodorovitch_karamazov.spoilerFreeIntro: A gentle and thoughtful young man, Alexey Fyodorovitch Karamazov is the youngest son of Fyodor Pavlovitch Karamazov.

fyodor_pavlovitch_karamazov.name: Fyodor Pavlovitch Karamazov
fyodor_pavlovitch_karamazov.spoilerFreeIntro: A wealthy landowner known for his scandalous behavior and reputation in the district.

dmitri_fyodorovitch_karamazov.name: Dmitri Fyodorovitch Karamazov
dmitri_fyodorovitch_karamazov.spoilerFreeIntro: The passionate and impulsive eldest son of Fyodor Pavlovitch, born of his first marriage.

ivan_fyodorovitch_karamazov.name: Ivan Fyodorovitch Karamazov
ivan_fyodorovitch_karamazov.spoilerFreeIntro: A quiet and intelligent young man, Ivan is the middle son of Fyodor Pavlovitch Karamazov.

adelaida_ivanovna_miusov.name: Adelaïda Ivanovna Miüsov
adelaida_ivanovna_miusov.spoilerFreeIntro: Adelaïda Ivanovna Miüsov was Fyodor Pavlovitch’s first wife, a distinguished heiress from the noble Miüsov family.

the_misov_family.name: The Miüsov Family
the_misov_family.spoilerFreeIntro: A distinguished and affluent noble family from the district, the Miüsovs are known for their land, status, and refined upbringing.

saint_petersburg.name: Petersburg
saint_petersburg.spoilerFreeIntro: Petersburg, a bustling Russian city alive with new ideas and restless seekers of change.

divinity_student.name: Divinity student
divinity_student.spoilerFreeIntro: A young divinity student, impoverished and earnest in his studies.

death_of_fyodor_pavlovitch_karamazov.name: Death of Fyodor Pavlovitch Karamazov
aliases: gloomy and tragic death (of Fyodor Pavlovitch)
searchTerms: gloomy and tragic death (of Fyodor Pavlovitch)

death_of_adelada_ivanovna_misov.name: Death of Adelaïda Ivanovna Miüsov
death_of_adelada_ivanovna_misov.spoilerFreeIntro: The mother of Fyodor Pavlovich's son Dmitri, Adelaïda Ivanovna Miüsov, passes away suddenly in Petersburg.

ophelia.name: Ophelia
ophelia.spoilerFreeIntro: A dreamy and imaginative young woman, inspired by literary heroines.
